title: Blades of destruction
description: New custom swords with custon texturees that have abillities such as summoning lighting or doing 2x damage
body:
##       Blades of destruction
**Blades of destruction is a custom plugin with custom models
It is most commonly used for SMP's
There are 5 blades each unbreakable,being able to only craft them once and their own custom powers**

upon the player joining he unlocks 5 new crafts each being for a new sword. 

**EmberWrath** - once crafted it goes to the players inventory and when in hand it grants permanent fire resistence and by shift + rightcliking fire keeps following u for aome seconds, this has a cooldown
you can also shift+switch hands to cause a massive explosion.

**Stormpiecer** - once crafted when in hand you can summon lighting over the nearest player by shift+rightcliking also it grants 50% more strength when theres thunder and 20% more strength when raining also 10% chance to stun player on hit.

**FrostVeil** - once crafted you gain permanent speed 2 on ice and permanent speed 1 in water
by shift+rightcliking u can place ice around u and by shift+swapping hands u can stun players that are around you.

**Duskreaver** - once crafted you can shift+rightclick to be invisible for 10 seconds
you can also shift + swap hands to teleport 5 block in front where you are looking
you also have a 10% to blind and slow a enemy while also having a 10% chance to gain strength on hit.

**Luminablade** - once crafted the player gains 40% strength in the end and 20% strength during the day
you can also shift+rightclick for your next hit to do 2x damage also shift+swapping hands gives u resistance for 10 seconds.

 the resource pack https://drive.google.com/file/d/1vzXTNv59tEnbB8gQI-KazA47fCGwy4uW/view?usp=sharing needed if u want them to have custon textures
